headline: NRG Energy and Vivint Invest $500,000 to Support Transformation of Cobbs Creek Golf Course and Expand Youth Education
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 09, 2026--NRG Energy and Vivint invest $500,000 to support the transformation of Cobbs Creek Golf Course and to expand youth education.
